_comment: PreToolUse write safety is enabled. It blocks Write/Edit/MultiEdit paths outside the active project working directory to prevent accidental cross-repo writes. Plugin location can be anywhere; run the host from the target template/app folder (or pass that folder as the current working directory).

hooks.command: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if(!root){console.error('PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'); process.exit(0);} require(path.resolve(root,'hooks','validate-write-safety.js'));"

node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const root=process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if(!root){console.error('PLUGIN_ROOT is not set'); process.exit(0);} require(path.resolve(root,'hooks','run-skill-posttool-validation.js'));"
